"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2024.3.4\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Snake.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Snake.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Snake.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\mingw32-g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Snake.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Snake.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSnake.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Snake.dir\linkLibs.rsp
